filter_pushdown.note: zone map skips blocks where zm[b].min > 10471; ~1-2% of 600 blocks skipped due to non-date-sorted storage order

group_by.structure: flat_array[6] of accumulators (sum_qty, sum_price, sum_disc_price, sum_charge, sum_disc, count)

data_structures.aggregation: flat_array[6] per thread (direct index, no hash table — 6 groups fits in registers)
data_structures.merge: sequential reduce of 64 thread-local flat_array[6] into global flat_array[6] — 384 ops total

scan_order: l_discount   (8B/row, SUM disc_price + SUM charge + AVG)

parallelism.synchronization: thread_local_flat_array_merge — no locks during scan; single sequential merge pass after all threads finish
parallelism.note: Zone map block boundaries align with morsel boundaries (block_size=100000). Each thread processes assigned blocks independently.

index_usage.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600][{int32_t min, int32_t max, uint32_t block_size} x 600]

simd_strategy.filter_vectorization: load 16x int32 l_shipdate values, compare <= 10471 with _mm512_cmplt_epi32_mask, produce 16-bit mask
simd_strategy.accumulation: masked double accumulation via _mm512_mask_add_pd for sum_qty, sum_price, sum_disc_price, sum_charge, sum_disc
simd_strategy.note: returnflag+linestatus group index computation done scalar after mask scatter; 6 groups fit in L1 cache

memory_footprint.per_thread_state: 6 slots x 7 doubles = 336 bytes (fits in L1 cache)
